reviews.comment:
Ideal para descansar bajo los árboles en el camping. Muy transitada en días festivos

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for relaxing under the trees at the campsite. Busy on holidays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMS15bzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Sucio,  sin agua ni papel, mal servicio. Vergüenza para el turismo. Sigan de largo! 10 y 11 de enero 2020. Había turistas brasileros. Muy mala imagen.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty, no water or toilet paper, poor service. Shame on tourism. Move on! January 10 and 11, 2020. There were Brazilian tourists. Very bad image.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaC11ZUxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me dio verguenza parar y ver tan poco servicio, tan sucio, sin agua ni papel higienico. Se supone que su rol es brindar servicio y es lo que menos ofrecen. Pasé el viernes 10 de enero. NO lo recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
I was embarrassed to stop by and see such poor service, so dirty, with no water or toilet paper. Their job is supposed to be to provide service, but that's the least they offer. I stopped by on Friday, January 10th. I do NOT recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaDZ1RFBBEAE

reviews.comment:

As always, their attention, cleanliness, good dining room and/or breakfast area.

reviews.comment:
Ubicacion ideal para hacer una parada tecnica durante un viaje. Baños publicos limpios, un espacio verde para descansar antes de continuar viaje.
Tiene tienda de comestibles y bebidas.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal location for a quick stop during a trip. Clean public restrooms, a green space to relax before continuing your journey. It also has a convenience store selling groceries and drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNczZPWkRBEAE
